description_long: This object is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly blue exterior and angular, aerodynamic lines. The fuselage is compact, with a sharply pointed nose and a forward-placed, enclosed cockpit featuring a transparent canopy. The wings are swept back and positioned mid-fuselage, with pronounced vertical stabilizers at the rear, giving the aircraft a distinctive, aggressive profile. The sides of the fuselage display red and white striped markings, adding visual contrast to the blue body. The undercarriage and engine details are minimal or not visible, suggesting a streamlined design focused on speed and maneuverability. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a high-performance, possibly fictional or concept, urban aircraft.
description: A blue, angular airplane with swept-back wings, a pointed nose, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Red and white stripes accent the sides, and the tail features prominent vertical stabilizers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuselage, swept-back wings, pointed nose, and red and white striped markings on the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the vertical stabilizers extending upward at the rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the blue body, angular wings, and striped markings.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, the back of the cockpit, and the overall width of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept-back wings and prominent twin vertical stabilizers; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet (implied by design, though not explicitly visible).
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail configuration, resembling an H-tail or twin-fin layout.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visibly extended; configuration not clearly shown.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage.
